title: Slovakian Smoky Herbal Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish from Slovakia, infused with smoky and herbal notes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoky paprika and dried marjoram, and stir to combine.
Add the Slovakian pilaf rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
